text:
is the 17th chapter of the 2nd volume and the 44th chapter overall of the Spoof on Titan manga, written and illustrated by hounori.

Overview

 Sasha's hunches end up correct, half of the time. 

Summary

Sasha has a hunch that Jean will lose a draw, while Mikasa comments that whenever Sasha has a bad feeling, she is always right about it. Suddenly, her hunch comes true, and Jean loses the lottery, earning the consolation prize for his loss.

Armin commends Sasha's accurate hunches, which she claims to be her hunting intuition. Connie steps forward to take his lucky draw, and Sasha shares that she has a good feeling about it. However, Connie loses and gets mad at her, and he is convinced that he lost because she jinxed his luck when she predicted the draw's outcome.

Mikasa is the last person to draw, and she asks Sasha if she thinks that she will win. Sasha guarantees that she will, which receives a warning from Jean to refrain from saying such things lest she jinxes Mikasa's turn. She tells him that intuition is not a reliable source to begin with, when, to everyone's shock, Mikasa wins the lottery and receives a hair-growth formula as a prize. Although Sasha's hunches were correct, she, Connie, and Jean were dismayed by the prize.

Later on, Sasha decides to use her intuition to help others, believing that it would be a waste to not use her special talent. Seeing Eren, she tells him that she has a bad feeling about the bread that he is about to eat and that it will upset his stomach. Sasha takes the bread from him and starts eating it to dispose of what she claims to be dangerous, making Eren mad.

Hannah invites Franz for a walk and says that she has a feeling that something good will happen today. Franz affirms that she does indeed have good intuition, and they set out for a walk. Moments later, Hannah spots the bag that she has always wanted on display and thinks about buying it. Franz becomes nervous, but he buys it for her in the end. Hannah is overjoyed that her intuition came true, while Franz weakly agrees, saying that seeing her smile is a good occurrence on his part.

Connie loses his wallet, and Sasha helps him look for it, guaranteeing that they will find it. Connie remembers that Sasha's hunches are always wrong, which prompts Sasha to say that deep inside, she has a feeling that they will not find it. Connie panics and loses hope, but Sasha takes it back, making Connie hopeful again.

Sasha uses her hunting intuition on a makeup exam, but she does poorly. When Shadis speaks with her, she bribes him with a bottle of hair-growth formula and has a feeling that she will get yelled at. However, Shadis is swayed by her bribery and tells her to do better next time instead of yelling at her.
